arts.ttl: Barcelona make transfer decision on €100m Chelsea target
arts.sum: Barcelona have been linked with Benfica's sought-after striker Vangelis Pavlidis.

arts.ttl: Talks held this week: Chelsea make contact with Arsenal target’s representatives
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly already had some contacts over a potential transfer move for one of the biggest defensive prospects in the game. According to Simon Phillips, the Blues spoke this week with the representatives of Ajax wonderkid Jorrel Hato, who has also been tracked by Arsenal for some time. arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk to Chelsea transfer truth after major Liverpool contract decision made
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk has reportedly handed Chelsea a transfer blow after signing a new two-year deal with the Premier League side. However, they promptly moved away from the prospect as they got the feeling that he was going to sign a new contract at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's bombshell Virgil van Dijk transfer bid and Liverpool star's honest response
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk has revealed he "always" intended to sign a new contract with Liverpool, despite Chelsea reportedly making a move to sign him on a free transfer

arts.ttl: Revealed: Van Dijk REJECTED Chelsea before signing new Liverpool contract
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly explored the possibility of signing Virgil van Dijk on a free transfer this summer before he agreed a new contract with Liverpool . Following confirmation of his new deal at Liverpool, Van Dijk told the club’s website : “I’m very happy, very proud.

arts.ttl: Legia Warsaw manager thinks he knows how to target Chelsea and produce sensational comeback in Conference League
arts.sum: Needs to be something beyond special...

arts.ttl: Chelsea, Arsenal and Liverpool send scouts to watch 19-year-old La Liga wonderkid
arts.sum: One of the breakout stars of the 2024-25 La Liga season, the name of Jesus Rodriguez has been increasingly a talking point in the second half of the year. At 19 years of age, the Real Betis winger has already managed to assert himself as a starter for a European contender. arts.ttl: Enzo Marseca to give Chelsea starlet Andrey Santos chance to impress in the Club World Cup after superb loan spell
arts.sum: Mail Sport can confirm the midfielder will have his chance to impress Maresca in two months' time as he will be selected to join the first-team squad in the United States for the FIFA tournament.

arts.ttl: Benjamin Sesko: Man United, Arsenal, Chelsea among clubs who 'learn asking price' of Leipzig star amid 'gentleman's agreement'
arts.sum: A host of Europe's top clubs reportedly discover the asking price of in-demand RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko ahead of the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca makes Chelsea supporters plea over growing frustrations
arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca is dealing with an increasingly disillusioned fanbase.
